en.k3d: 3 strength · 2 swims · 1 hike · 30,254 kg Hevy volume
en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 2 – Jul 8 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 424 kcal/day, peaking 823 on Thursday's double (squats + open water). Monday (Jul 6) was a full rest day (63 kcal); Wednesday (Jul 8) is just starting — swim intervals planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −838 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Wednesday (Jul 8) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Thursday doubled up: squats + open water
en.i1: Thursday stacked the squat session (61 min, avg HR 114 / max 153) with a 1.1 km open-water swim in Primošten — 894 active kcal combined, the biggest day of the window.
en.i2t: Two open-water swims plus a hike held the aerobic base
en.i2: Two easy Primošten open-water swims — 1.1 km Thursday (avg HR 107) and 1.2 km Friday (avg 98) — plus Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike (avg HR 117, 731 kcal) carried the aerobic work this week.
en.i3: RHR held between 52 and 56 across the week and sits at 55 today; HRV eased to 38, three below its 7-day baseline of 41. Last night was solid — 7h25 at score 84 off a 22:44 bedtime — a step down from Monday's 91 but still 20 min above the weekly average.
en.i4t: Three lifts; hack squat progression logged
en.i4: Hevy tonnage this week: Thursday's squats 7,956 kg, Saturday's trap-bar deadlift 8,312 kg and Tuesday's hack squat 13,986 kg — 30,254 kg across the three lifts. Tuesday's hack squat topped out at 150 kg with per-set HR peaks climbing 126 → 155, now appended to the strength chart.
en.rec: Wednesday is a planned swim-interval day. The week behind: 6 sessions across 5 active days (5h55, ~2,976 active kcal) — three strength lifts (squats 7,956 kg, trap-bar DL 8,312 kg, hack squat 13,986 kg; 30,254 kg total), two easy open-water swims, and Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike. Monday was a full rest day. Recovery is solid: RHR sits at 55 and HRV eased to 38 (three below baseline) after a good night — 7h25 at score 84. The autonomic dip is the expected cost of Tuesday's hack squat, not a warning. Go into today's swim intervals fresh. Next: Thu squat, Sat trap-bar DL per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-02 → 2026-07-08 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 snage · 2 plivanja · 1 planinarenje · 30.254 kg Hevy volumen
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 2.7. – 8.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 424 kcal/dan, vrhunac 823 na četvrtkovom dvostrukom (čučnjevi + otvorena voda). Ponedjeljak (6.7.) je bio potpuni dan odmora (63 kcal); srijeda (8.7.) tek počinje — planirani intervali plivanja.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −838 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Srijeda (8.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Četvrtak je spojio trening čučnja (61 min, prosj. puls 114 / maks 153) s plivanjem 1,1 km na otvorenom u Primoštenu — ukupno 894 aktivne kcal, najveći dan prikazanog tjedna.
hr.i2t: Dva plivanja na otvorenom i planinarenje držali su bazu
hr.i2: Dva lagana plivanja u Primoštenu — 1,1 km četvrtak (prosj. puls 107) i 1,2 km petak (prosj. 98) — plus nedjeljno planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu (prosj. puls 117, 731 kcal) nosili su aerobni rad ovog tjedna.
hr.i3t: Oporavak: dobra noć, autonomika se smirila
hr.i3: RHR se kroz tjedan kretao između 52 i 56, danas na 55; HRV se spustio na 38, tri ispod 7-dnevne osnovice od 41. Sinoć je bila solidna — 7h25 uz ocjenu 84, lijeganje u 22:44 — korak niže od ponedjeljkovih 91, ali i dalje 20 min iznad tjednog prosjeka.
hr.i4t: Tri dizanja; zabilježena hack squat progresija
hr.i4: Hevy tonaža ovog tjedna: četvrtkovi čučnjevi 7.956 kg, subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje 8.312 kg i utorkov hack squat 13.986 kg — ukupno 30.254 kg kroz tri dizanja. Utorkov hack squat dosegnuo je 150 kg uz vrhove pulsa po seriji koji rastu 126 → 155, sada dodane na graf snage.
hr.rec: Srijeda je planirani dan intervala plivanja. Tjedan iza: 6 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (5h55, ~2.976 aktivnih kcal) — tri dizanja snage (čučnjevi 7.956 kg, trap-bar MD 8.312 kg, hack squat 13.986 kg; ukupno 30.254 kg), dva lagana plivanja na otvorenom i nedjeljno planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak je bio potpuni odmor. Oporavak je solidan: RHR je na 55, a HRV se spustio na 38 (tri ispod osnovice) nakon dobre noći — 7h25 uz ocjenu 84. Autonomni pad je očekivana cijena utorkovog hack squata, ne upozorenje. Uđi u današnje intervale plivanja svjež. Sljedeće: čet čučanj, sub trap-bar MD po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 2.7. → 8.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
